## Source Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | |
| **Domain** | |
| **Country** | |
| **Bloc** | western / non-aligned / adversarial / other |
| **Owner Entity** | |
| **Ownership Type** | public / private / state / nonprofit / cooperative |
| **Funding Model** | subscription / advertising / state / mixed / grants |
| **Primary Language** | |
| **RSS/Atom Feeds** | (list URLs) |
| **Credibility Score (0-100)** | |
| **Bias Score (-100 to +100)** | |
| **Verification Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |

## Evidence
Links to public filings, ownership disclosures, about pages, Media Bias/Fact Check, AllSides, etc.

## Why This Source Matters
What coverage gap does it fill? What bloc/region/language is underrepresented?

## Checklist
- [ ] Source is a real, operating news outlet
- [ ] Ownership is verifiable from public records
- [ ] RSS/Atom feed exists and works
- [ ] Not a content farm / aggregator / press release wire
- [ ] Adds geographic or bloc diversity

## Maintainer Notes
(Internal use)
